title: Cauthon Silk Spawners
description: a plugin that lets you use silk touch pickaxes to grab spawners
body:
## Features
Silk Touch Spawners: Players can harvest spawners using a Silk Touch-enchanted tool.

Placing Spawners: Players can place the custom spawner items to create spawners that will spawn the corresponding entity type.

We have a discord now!!! [https://discord.gg/62493Tu5AD](https://discord.gg/62493Tu5AD)
